headline: Liverpool reject Inter's €25m bid for Curtis Jones
body: Liverpool have rejected a verbal offer of €25 million from Inter for Curtis Jones, as they value the player at around €40 million.
text:
Given current price tags in midfield market, understandable Liverpool holding firm after turning down €25m verbal offer from Inter for Curtis Jones. Considerably short of valuation. LFC want around €40m for Jones, who has one year left on his contract. 
nytimes.com/athletic/7380846…

Link



Liverpool reject €25m offer from Inter for Curtis Jones

Liverpool want around €40million (£35m) to sell Jones, who has one year remaining on his contract at Anfield.
